decisionSummary: Visible advanced/high-risk GTK widget wiring was implemented for decoration.screen_shader. The visible control is separated from write/apply controls and routes only to the already proven non-production UI action model. In this sprint the button proves the explicit-trigger missing-selection path without reading files or running a compiler. Full GTK file chooser execution remains deferred.
standaloneCompilerCommandScope: full regression may run existing helper tests against generated temp fixtures only; the new visible GTK missing-selection path does not run a compiler

recommendedValidationPolicy.summary: The visible widget may expose only advisory state. It cannot approve, block, or bypass writes, and full file chooser execution remains deferred.

compatibilityGaps: Full GTK file chooser execution is not implemented.
Selected-file boundary is not proven through a visible file chooser.
Cancellation/progress behavior is not proven through a visible GTK control.
No screenshot-backed UI proof was run because the testable projection and window wiring were sufficient for this non-mutating proof.
Advisory glslangValidator output is not Hyprland runtime safety proof.
No production compile-aware validator is implemented.
proofUsed: src/ui/window.rs renders an advanced advisory section only when RowDetailProjection has screen_shader_advisory and screen_shader_advisory_widget metadata.
src/ui/window.rs places the advisory section before and separate from write/apply controls.
src/ui/window.rs button invokes run_screen_shader_advisory_ui_action with no selected file, proving the visible missing-selection path without reading files or running a compiler.
tests/row_detail.rs proves only decoration.screen_shader projects advisory widget metadata.
tests/screen_shader_advisory_gtk_widget_wiring_proof.rs proves report fields, result states, missing-selection behavior, and write-safety disconnection.
Existing UI action model tests prove advisory pass/fail/unavailable/timeout/temp-copy/cleanup-warning states remain non-authoritative.
proofStillMissing: Full GTK file chooser execution proof.
Selected-file boundary proof through visible file chooser interaction.
Cancellation/progress behavior proof through visible GTK UI.
Screenshot-backed visual proof, if later required.
Any proof that standalone glslangValidator output is equivalent to Hyprland runtime OpenGL compile/link behavior.
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader optional advisory file chooser execution proof sprint: implement visible file selection only if it can use generated fixture/temp files in tests, never read real user shader files in tests, pass only temp paths to glslangValidator, and keep advisory output disconnected from write safety.
